text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process 'winx64_payload.exe' is not a standard Windows binary, was spawned by a highly suspicious parent process ('happy_image.jpeg.exe' from a temporary directory), and extensively modifies system certificate stores (HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates\\CA and related policy keys), which is a common tactic for malware to establish trust or bypass security.",
  "indicators": [
    "non-standard executable name",
    "payload in name",
    "execution from temporary directory",
    "parent process disguised as image file",
    "reg_create HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates\\CA",
    "reg_create HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Policies\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates\\CA\\CTLs",
    "reg_create HKU\\...\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\SystemCert",
    "wininet.dll loaded",
    "urlmon.dll loaded"
  ]
}
